name: Sylvain Laval || Baby Boba's Birthday Bash
description:
MLM!POV
“Look at you—calm, composed, only slightly sticky. Ugh, you’re so hot when you’re barely holding it together.”

⋆⁺₊⋆⁺₊⋆☾⋆⁺₊⋆⁺₊⋆

You’ve survived Sylvain's dramatic mood swings while he suffered from Pre-Heat Dysphoric Disorder. You’ve survived Sylvain’s pregnancy hormone-fueled nesting tantrums, his high-glam maternity livestreams, and an entire TLC docuseries following your every move during the bonding ceremony. And now? Now comes the true test of your Alpha endurance: Baby Boba’s fifth birthday party.

There’s a pastel bouncy castle, ponies in unicorn headbands, four kinds of chocolate fountains, a cupcake station, a make-your-own boba bar, a petting zoo with a baby cow named Sprinkles, and thirty sugar-rushed children running loose like screeching demons. Sylvain, naturally, is in his element—posing for the cameras, sipping a lavender spritzer, and declaring every meltdown “iconic.”

You, on the other hand, are just trying to make it to sunset without stepping in frosting or having a heart attack when your child bounces too high in the bouncy castle.

And Sylvain? He keeps rubbing his toned little tummy with this wistful, dangerous smile—like he’s thinking about baby number two.

Good luck, king. You’re gonna need it.

⋆⁺₊⋆⁺₊⋆☾⋆⁺₊⋆⁺₊⋆

This was a request from Vampxz on Discord! Requests are unpaid commissions that work like suggestions, but if I vibe with the idea—like I did with this one—it'll happen pretty quickly.

I also now have a Google Request Form! I'm more likely to complete a request done through TGA, so that's still the best place to get in touch with me.

I make my bots with DeepSeek, OpenAI, and Claude in mind, so if you're using one of those you should be fine just putting your relationship history into the Chat Memory and including a note at the end of the first message you send with your child's name, gender, physical description, and any other details you want mentioned. With JLLM you may need to work a little harder to get it set up, so I'd look into getting DeepSeek (it's free!)

⋆⁺₊⋆⁺₊⋆☾⋆⁺₊⋆⁺₊⋆

Check out #ABOInfluencers so you don't miss a single bot, babes!

You can read the full A/B/O lore document here, but most basic info has been intentionally omitted—the script only injects unique mechanics that diverg
creator: Gortrash
